metadata.title: Valqore Compliance Evidence — AI Agent Governance Posture

parties.name: Valqore Engine
parties.remarks: Deterministic governance engine v1.7.0. Sealed-loop architecture: AI explains, rules decide.

import-ap.remarks: No external assessment plan; this report is generated by the Valqore evidence pipeline directly from rule evaluation.

results.title: AI Agent Governance Posture Compliance Evaluation
results.description: Deterministic evaluation of 5 controls. Verdict: UNGOVERNED. Compliance rate: 0%.

observations.title: AIG-144 (FAIL)
observations.description: AI agent missing dedicated service account (no serviceAccountName and no valqore.io/agent-sa)

observations.title: AIG-147 (FAIL)
observations.description: AI agent missing PR/commit author-signal declaration (valqore.io/agent-author-signal)

observations.title: AIG-149 (FAIL)
observations.description: AI agent missing machine-identity declaration (valqore.io/agent-mtls)

observations.title: AIG-172 (FAIL)
observations.description: AI agent without an A2A AgentCard — it cannot be discovered or trusted across the fleet. Publish one and set valqore.io/agent-card.

observations.title: AIG-092 (FAIL)

observations.description: AI agent without tool-call cap — each tool call costs money, uncapped agents generate hundreds of calls

observations.description: Multi-tenant agent without per-tenant budget — one user's complex queries can exhaust the entire org budget

observations.title: AIG-104 (FAIL)
observations.description: Agent without context window management — 128K context at GPT-4 = $3.84/request. Use summarization or sliding window
